hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys,json,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
if f.endswith('.cs'):
    env=os.environ.copy()
    env['PATH']=env.get('PATH','')+os.pathsep+os.path.expanduser('~/.dotnet/tools')
    subprocess.run(['csharpier','format',f],env=env)
" 2>/dev/null || true
